summary: Data-only backfill: judged fields (should_fire ORACLE_FREEZE CRITICAL / must_not_fire silent / severities / max_emitted{WARN,0} / beta / answers 0.0&1.0 / refs 1.0) are byte-identical to prior label.json; only oracle_address placeholder->real measured 0xcb7e..3c82 and MEASURED notes changed.
